span.p:
scene_proj
DomainAwareTwoLayerMLP
1152 → 1536 → 1536, GELU
4-domain Embedding rows
~5 M × 4 params

div.style: color: rgb(59, 39, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
action_query_hub.queries
shared (64, 1536) zero-init
~98 K params, trainable

span.p:
soft_prompt_hub
nn.Embedding(4, 32 × 1536)
4-domain × 32 prompt tokens
~196 K params

span.p:
Layout v33+:
[BOS] [soft_prompt(32)] [scene-placeholder(256)] [prompt_text(20)] [action(64)] [EOS]
= 374 token IDs
soft_prompt 位置: 259462..259493
scene 位置: 258949..259204
action 位置: 258885..258948
(NO PROPRIO slot)

scatter:
· soft_e at packed.idx['soft_prompt']
· scene_e at packed.idx['scene']
· action_q_e at packed.idx['action']

span.p:
Gemma4TextModel · 35 layers
frozen base + LoRA q_proj/v_proj r=64 α=128
~13.8 M LoRA params trainable
NO no_grad-wrap (LoRA needs grad)

span.p:
block_i (× 24) MLPResNetBlock_Pro:
4-stream attention
q from x; k_self/v_self from x
k_adapter/v_adapter from h_a[:,i+1] ⊕ p
k_task/v_task from h_t[:,i+1] (256 tokens)
k_wrist/v_wrist from h_w_bridge[:,i+1]
RoPE on q + each k_*
tanh(g_task), tanh(g_wrist) gating
+ FFN (LN + Linear D→D + ReLU)
